items.title: American Express (AXP)’s CEO “is Remarkable,” Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 11 Stocks Jim Cramer Shared His Insights On. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is a stock that Jim Cramer has used as a proxy for consumer spending and remained optimistic about throughout the year. He believes the firm’s CEO, Steve Squeri, has […]
